name: nextjs-ai-template
purpose: Baseline template for AI-generated software projects.

directoryRoles.src/app: Routes, layouts, and route metadata only.
directoryRoles.src/modules: Feature modules and example product surfaces.
directoryRoles.src/config: Shared navigation, route context, and metadata config.
directoryRoles.src/components: Shared UI primitives and shell components.
directoryRoles.prisma: Schema, migrations, and local seed tooling.

templateSurface.responsibility: Contains starter/example screens that can be replaced by downstream products.

conventions.envAccess: Use env from src/env.ts in application code.
conventions.moduleImports: Import modules through public entrypoints only.
conventions.routeLogic: Keep business logic out of src/app.
